title: prunella asiatica var. albiflora
intro: Prunella asiatica var. albiflora, also known as White Selfheal, is a subspecies of the Prunella asiatica plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of White Selfheal include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of White Selfheal can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
